---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
date: ""
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)

il_counties <- readRDS("data/il_counties.rds")
il_map <- st_transform(il_counties, crs = 4326)
```

```{r css, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat('<style>
  .leaflet-container { background: #faf9f6 !important; }
  body { background: #faf9f6; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  .leaflet { margin: 0 auto; display: block; }
  html { background: #faf9f6; }
</style>')
```

```{r css 2, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat('<style>
  body { margin: 0; padding: 0; background: #faf9f6; }
  html { background: #faf9f6; }
  .leaflet-container { background: #faf9f6 !important; }
  .leaflet-control-zoom { display: none; }
</style>')
```
```{r plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
il_map <- il_map |>
  mutate(highlight = ifelse(turnout_rate < 0.60, "Below 60%", "Above 60%"))
pal_highlight <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("Above 60%" = "#d0cfc9", "Below 60%" = "#e67e22"),
  domain = il_map$highlight
)
leaflet(il_map, options = leafletOptions(scrollWheelZoom = FALSE)) |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~pal_highlight(highlight),
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    color = "white",
    weight = 0.5,
    label = ~ifelse(turnout_rate < 0.60, 
                    paste0(county, ": ", scales::percent(turnout_rate, accuracy = 0.1)),
                    NA),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(noHide = FALSE)
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    pal = pal_highlight,
    values = ~highlight,
    title = "Turnout Rate",
    position = "bottomleft"
  ) |>
  htmlwidgets::onRender("
    function(el, x) {
      el.style.background = '#faf9f6';
      el.querySelector('.leaflet-container').style.background = '#faf9f6';
      setTimeout(function() {
        var map = HTMLWidgets.find(el).getMap();
        map.invalidateSize();
        map.fitBounds([[36.9, -91.5], [42.5, -87.0]]);
      }, 300);
    }
  ")
```
